title: Section 20
content: When any tax, interest, penalty or any other sum is payable under this Act, the 35 Assessing Officer shall serve upon the assessee a notice of demand in the prescribed form, specifying the sum so payable and the amount of chargeable expenditure in relation to which such sum is payable.
footnote: 35. Subs. by Act 26 of 1988, s. 72, for “Income-tax Officer” (w.e.f. 1-4-1988).
